name: Cynicism
tagline: Strip life to its essentials. The rest is borrowed costume.
summary: Ancient Cynicism — not the modern attitude of distrust — was a radical commitment to living according to nature and against convention. Its practitioners owned nothing, told the truth bluntly, and treated social status as theatre to be ignored.

quotes.text: I am looking for an honest man.
quotes.author: Diogenes

quotes.text: It is the privilege of the gods to want nothing.
quotes.author: Diogenes

quotes.text: He has the most who is most content with the least.
quotes.author: Diogenes

quotes.text: Of what use is a philosopher who never offends?
quotes.author: Diogenes
